title: MP4 → HLS (m3u8) Transcode API

tasks.title: Add ffmpeg + upload + static-serving dependencies
tasks.end_state: backend/package.json includes fluent-ffmpeg, @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg, @nestjs/serve-static, @types/fluent-ffmpeg, @types/multer and they install.
tasks.verify: cd backend && node -e "require('@ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg'); require('fluent-ffmpeg'); console.log('deps ok')"

tasks.title: VideoService — transcode mp4 → HLS (guard-first)
tasks.end_state: transcodeToHls(file) validates first, writes public/hls/<jobId>/index.m3u8 + .ts segments, returns { id, playlistUrl, outputDir }, throws BadRequestException on invalid input.
tasks.verify: cd backend && npm run test -- src/video/video.service.spec.ts

tasks.title: VideoController — POST /videos/transcode (multipart)
tasks.end_state: POST /videos/transcode accepts field 'file' via FileInterceptor, delegates to VideoService, returns JSON result.

tasks.title: Wire VideoModule + static serving into app
tasks.end_state: app.module.ts imports VideoModule and ServeStaticModule (root backend/public); public/ folder exists.

tasks.title: Run BE test loop and clean up
tasks.end_state: All test-cases.md cases pass via .spec.ts; the temporary .spec.ts is deleted after passing.
tasks.verify: cd backend && npm run test -- src/video/video.service.spec.ts

success_criteria: cd backend && npm run test -- src/video/video.service.spec.ts
Valid .mp4 upload creates backend/public/hls/<jobId>/index.m3u8 + .ts segments and returns playlistUrl
Non-mp4 / missing file returns HTTP 400 and writes nothing to disk
